sentences.arabic: كَانَ الرَّاعِي يَأْخُذُ الأَغْنَامَ إِلَى الْجَبَلِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Pastir je svakog jutra vodio ovce na planinu.
sentences.translationEn: The shepherd used to take the sheep to the mountain every morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَجْلِسُ تَحْتَ الشَّجَرَةِ وَيَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Sjedio je ispod drveta i gledao ih.
sentences.translationEn: He would sit under a tree and watch them.

sentences.translation: Ovce su mirno jele zelenu travu.
sentences.translationEn: The sheep ate the green grass calmly.

sentences.arabic: عَادَ إِلَى الْقَرْيَةِ قَبْلَ غُرُوبِ الشَّمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Vratio se u selo prije zalaska sunca.
sentences.translationEn: He returned to the village before sunset.
